case_title: BRUSCHI, ELVIRA vs. CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUSCHI, ELVIRA AS TO DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUSCHI, ELVIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2400 41ST AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUSCHI, ELVIRA SERVED JAN-17-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CANTROVICH, CHRISTINA
